title: नाग गायत्री
devanagariText:
॥ श्री नाग गायत्री ॥

॥ ध्यानम् ॥
फणामण्डलमण्डितं भुजगेन्द्रं सहस्रफणम्।
विषहरं विषधरं वासुकिं प्रणमाम्यहम्॥

शेषं च वासुकिं चैव तक्षकं कालियं तथा।
पद्मं महापद्ममनन्तं शंखपालकमष्टकम्॥

॥ नाग गायत्री मन्त्र ॥
ॐ नागराजाय विद्महे
सर्पराजाय धीमहि
तन्नो नागः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ द्वितीय रूप ॥
ॐ अनन्ताय विद्महे
नागेन्द्राय धीमहि
तन्नो शेषः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ तृतीय रूप ॥
ॐ वासुकये विद्महे
विषहराय धीमहि
तन्नो सर्पः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ अष्टनाग स्तुति ॥
अनन्तं वासुकिं शेषं पद्मनाभं च कम्बलम्।
शंखपालं धृतराष्ट्रं तक्षकं कालियं तथा॥

एतानि नवनागानां नामानि प्रतिदिनम्।
यः पठेत्प्रातरुत्थाय तस्य सर्पभयं न हि॥

॥ नाग मन्त्र ॥
ॐ नमो भगवते वासुकये।
ॐ नागेभ्यो नमः।
ॐ सर्पेभ्यो नमः।

॥ फलश्रुति ॥
नागगायत्रीं यो जपेन्नित्यं भक्तिभावेन मानवः।
सर्पभयं न तस्यास्ति कालसर्पदोषनाशनम्॥

॥ इति श्री नाग गायत्री सम्पूर्णा ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Naga Gayatri ||

|| Dhyanam ||
Phana-mandala-manditam Bhujagendram Sahasra-phanam.
Visha-haram Visha-dharam Vasukim pranamamy-aham.

Shesham cha Vasukim chaiva Takshakam Kaliyam tatha.
Padmam Maha-padmam-Anantam Shankha-palakam-ashtakam.

|| Naga Gayatri Mantra ||
Om Nagarajaya Vidmahe
Sarpa-rajaya Dhimahi
Tanno Nagah Prachodayat.

|| Dwitiya Rupa ||
Om Anantaya Vidmahe
Nagendraya Dhimahi
Tanno Sheshah Prachodayat.

|| Tritiya Rupa ||
Om Vasukaye Vidmahe
Visha-haraya Dhimahi
Tanno Sarpah Prachodayat.

|| Ashta-naga Stuti ||
Anantam Vasukim Shesham Padmanabham cha Kambalam.
Shankha-palam Dhritarashtram Takshakam Kaliyam tatha.

Etani Nava-naganam namani pratidinam.
Yah pathet pratar-utthaya tasya sarpa-bhayam na hi.

|| Naga Mantra ||
Om Namo Bhagavate Vasukaye.
Om Nagebhyo Namah.
Om Sarpebhyo Namah.

|| Phalashruti ||
Naga-gayatrim yo japen-nityam bhakti-bhavena manavah.
Sarpa-bhayam na tasyasti Kala-sarpa-dosha-nashanam.

|| Iti Shri Naga Gayatri Sampurna ||
hindiMeaning: फणामण्डल से मण्डित, सहस्र फणों वाले, विषहर, विषधर भुजगेन्द्र वासुकि को प्रणाम। शेष, वासुकि, तक्षक, कालिय, पद्म, महापद्म, अनन्त, शंखपाल - ये आठ प्रमुख नाग हैं। 'ॐ नागराजाय विद्महे, सर्पराजाय धीमहि, तन्नो नागः प्रचोदयात्' - नाग गायत्री। अनन्त, वासुकि, शेष, पद्मनाभ, कम्बल, शंखपाल, धृतराष्ट्र, तक्षक, कालिय - इन नव नागों के नामों का प्रातः पाठ करने से सर्पभय नहीं रहता। नाग गायत्री के नित्य जप से कालसर्पदोष का नाश होता है।
benefits: Three Gayatri mantras dedicated to the Naga (serpent) deities
Removes fear of snakes and serpent-related troubles
Powerful remedy for Kala Sarpa Dosha in horoscope
Includes Ashta-naga stuti and nine Naga names
Ideal for Nag Panchami worship and serpent appeasement
description: Naga Gayatri — नाग गायत्री — is a powerful Vedic meditation mantra offered to Lord Shiva. Drawn from Traditional, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to remove fear of snakes and serpent-related troubles as well as include Ashta-naga stuti and nine Naga names. For best results, devotees chant this during Nag Panchami. With 8 verses and a reading time of about 7 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Naga Gayatri in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Naga Gayatri mantra in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Three Gayatri forms for serpent deities to remove Kala Sarpa Dosha and snake fears.
